entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: Taisteal Ama IS chun Stair a Fhoghlaim

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Taisteal Ama IS chun Stair a Fhoghlaim chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: faigh pas ama, glan comhairle taistil, ansin fiosraigh sochaí stairiúil ar leith trí radharc, mapa, amlíne, daoine, rialacha, fardal, agus fianaise.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: Taisteal Ama IS chun Stair a Fhoghlaim: treoir phraiticiúil
Teagascóir IS chun rud ar bith a fhoghlaim

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts
entries.value: Cóitseálaí Scríbhneoireachta IS d’Aistí, Scéalta, agus Dréachtaí Níos Soiléire

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Cóitseálaí Scríbhneoireachta IS d’Aistí, Scéalta, agus Dréachtaí Níos Soiléire chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: feabhsaigh aistí, scéalta, ríomhphoist, agus argóintí le haiseolas spriocdhírithe a choinníonn do ghuth slán.
Aiseolas scríbhneoireachta IS do mhic léinn

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Aiseolas scríbhneoireachta IS a choinníonn do ghuth slán.
ardán foghlama IS, ardán staidéir IS

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: Gach pras tosaithe foghlama IS inspir

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: Gach comhrá foghlama IS poiblí in aon áit shoiléir amháin.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Níor chóir do chompánach foghlama IS ligean air gur údarás draíochta é. Níor chóir dó éiginnteacht a scriosadh, múinteoirí a athsholáthar, ná foghlaimeoirí a oiliúint chun freagraí a chóipeáil. Bíonn na córais is fearr macánta faoi theorainneacha agus soiléir faoin difríocht idir cabhair agus cur ar aghaidh.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: Síniú leictreonach nó fisiciúil ón duine atá údaraithe gníomhú thar ceann úinéir an leasa cóipchirt; cur síos ar an saothar faoi chóipcheart a mhaíonn tú a sáraíodh, lena n-áirítear an URL (is é sin, seoladh an leathanaigh ghréasáin) den áit a bhfuil an saothar faoi chóipcheart ann nó cóip den saothar faoi chóipcheart; sainaithint an URL nó áit shonrach eile ar an tSeirbhís ina bhfuil an t-ábhar a mhaíonn tú atá sáraitheach suite; do sheoladh, d’uimhir theileafóin, agus do sheoladh ríomhphoist; ráiteas uait go gcreideann tú de mheon macánta nach bhfuil an úsáid atá faoi dhíospóid údaraithe ag úinéir an chóipchirt, ag a ghníomhaire, ná ag an dlí; ráiteas uait, déanta faoi phionós mionnú éithigh, go bhfuil an fhaisnéis thuas i d’fhógra cruinn agus gur tusa úinéir an chóipchirt nó go bhfuil tú údaraithe gníomhú thar ceann úinéir an chóipchirt.

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: gnáthdhuine a bhfuil tionchar ag an gcinneadh air;

entries.source: Analyze a chart from my textbook
entries.value: Déan anailís ar chairt ó mo théacsleabhar

entries.source: Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Freagair ceist seiceála, bain triail as céim, déan éileamh a phlé, athbhreithnigh dréacht, nó tóg cártaí aisghairme.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Freagair an cheist ghníomhach i d'fhocail féin

entries.source: Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: Freagair an foghlaimeoir go díreach, ansin tairg dhá chonair fhéideartha: bunús níos simplí nó fiosrú níos doimhne.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Féadfaidh rialacha ar leith ó na Téarmaí Seirbhíse seo a bheith i bhfeidhm ar aon chomórtais, crannchuir nó cur chun cinn eile (le chéile, “Promotions”) a chuirtear ar fáil tríd an tSeirbhís. Má ghlacann tú páirt in aon Promotions, déan athbhreithniú ar na rialacha infheidhme chomh maith lenár bPolasaí Príobháideachais. Má bhíonn rialacha Promotion i gcoimhlint leis na Téarmaí Seirbhíse seo, beidh rialacha Promotion i bhfeidhm.

entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: Ní ábhar foinse poiblí iad API, admin, reset, dromchlaí fóntais phríobháideacha, ná dromchlaí comhráite sábháilte príobháideacha.
Úsáid na haipe de réir aoise

entries.source: Applied AI learning work before the current AI wave.
entries.value: Obair foghlama IS fheidhmeach roimh an tonn IS reatha.

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: cuir coincheap i bhfeidhm ar shampla beag.

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new example.
entries.value: Cuir an smaoineamh i bhfeidhm ar shampla nua.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: An bhfuil leathanaigh lucht féachana poiblí agus innéacsaithe?

entries.source: Are private saved user conversations exposed to search?
entries.value: An nochtar comhráite príobháideacha sábháilte úsáideoirí don chuardach?
An bhfuil comhráite poiblí d’aíonna innéacsaithe?
An bhfuil tráthanna ceiste agus spléachchártaí san áireamh?
An fearr tráth na gceist ná athléamh?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: An bhfuil na hailt ceangailte le huirlisí beo foghlama IS?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: An bhfuil na leathanaigh seo ag rá go n-ionadaíonn inspir gach ardán foghlama?

entries.source: Are these pages written only for search engines?
entries.value: An bhfuil na leathanaigh seo scríofa d’innill chuardaigh amháin?

entries.source: Are these prompts just for ChatGPT?
entries.value: An bhfuil na prasaí seo díreach do ChatGPT?

entries.source: Are these real public pages or just app screens?
entries.value: An fíorleathanaigh phoiblí iad seo nó díreach scáileáin aipe?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: An bhfuil na sreafaí oibre seo saor le triail?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Déan argóint ar son an dá thaobh agus géaraigh do smaointeoireacht

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Art Appreciation Guide chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: fiosraigh saothair ealaíne, stíleanna, ealaíontóirí, roghanna amhairc, agus cad a dhéanann íomhá cumhachtach.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mód Foghlama IS Art Appreciation Guide: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prasaí agus lúb staidéir Art Appreciation Guide

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: Ailt, treoracha modha, agus lúba pras

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Fiafraigh faoi spriocanna, spriocdhátaí, am atá ar fáil, agus muinín reatha.
Cuir ceist ar Ambedkar faoin daonlathas

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Cuir ceist ar bith agus foghlaim trí mhínithe soiléire, samplaí, leideanna leantacha, agus teagasc AI foighneach.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Fiafraigh faoin lucht féachana, méadrach, rioscaí, agus conas feabhsú a chur san áireamh.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Iarr ar Code Tutor an tsamhail mheabhrach is simplí, sampla amháin, agus rud amháin a mhíthuigeann tosaitheoirí go minic.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Fiafraigh faoin ngnáthamh reatha, an nós sprice, agus an leagan laethúil is éasca.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Cuir ceisteanna leantacha, measúnaigh cruinneas agus muinín, ceartaigh bearnaí, agus bain triail eile as.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Iarr leid, bíodh ar an bhfoghlaimeoir an chéad chéim eile a mhíniú, ansin úsáid tráth ceiste nó spléachchárta chun seiceáil ar fhan an smaoineamh.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Iarr leid, ceist, nó seiceáil céime roimh an bhfreagra.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Iarr leid. Ná hiarr an freagra deiridh fós.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Iarr seiceáil míthuisceana, ceist ghearr aisghabhála, nó sampla níos deacra. Freagair sula n-iarrann tú ar an IS tú a cheartú.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Iarr míniú níos simplí ar an gcoincheap is laige.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Iarr tasc beag bídeach ar dtús.

entries.source: Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, leibhéal, nó liosta focal; ansin tabhair isteach tacar beag.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Iarr saothar ealaíne/stíl nó cuir creat féachana ar fáil.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Iarr ainmneacha tascanna, dátaí dlite, iarracht, agus stádas reatha.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Iarr lucht féachana, sprioc, agus stádas dréachta mura bhfuil sé soiléir; ansin tabhair aiseolas dírithe.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Iarr údar, teideal, dáta, foilsitheoir, URL, agus dáta rochtana nuair is gá.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Iarr am atá ar fáil, tascanna riachtanacha, agus leibhéal fuinnimh.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Iarr gealltanas, comhpháirtí/comhthéacs, minicíocht seiceáil isteach, agus cruthúnas.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Iarr réimse agus deacracht, ansin socraigh achoimre an cháis agus an chéad chinneadh.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Iarr eachtra agus doimhneacht, ansin scar cúiseanna cúlra ó spreagthaí láithreacha.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Iarr dáta scrúdaithe, siollabas, am atá ar fáil, agus muinín de réir ábhair.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Iarr cúig cheist a mheascann sainmhínithe, samplaí, agus fadhbanna aistrithe.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Iarr formáid, teorainn ama, agus lucht féachana; ansin cuir tús le babhta cleachtaidh.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Iarr sprioc, srianta, agus atmaisféar inmhianaithe; ansin tairg tacar smaointe éagsúil.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Iarr sprioc, amlíne, tascanna, agus cad a áirítear mar dhul chun cinn fíor.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Iarr scála grádaithe, meáchain, scóir reatha, agus sprioc.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Iarr méid grúpa, sprioc, fad, agus rithim seiceáil isteach.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Iarr leideanna, seiceálacha, agus aiseolas sula n-iarrann tú freagra críochnaithe.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Iarr leideanna, seiceálacha, aiseolas, agus pleananna staidéir a choinníonn an smaointeoireacht leis an bhfoghlaimeoir.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Iarr teanga, sprioc, agus cód/earráid más ábhartha.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Iarr teanga, leibhéal an fhoghlaimeora, agus cás; ansin tosaigh sa charachtar.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, spriocdháta, agus muinín roimhe seo.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Iarr tosaíocht athbhreithnithe amháin, ní athsholáthar críochnaithe.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Iarr tasc beag amháin sula n-iarrann tú an freagra.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Iarr tosaíocht struchtúrach amháin seachas athscríobh iomlán.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Iarr cártaí aon-smaoinimh le leideanna agus gaistí coitianta.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Iarr toradh, fad, seachráin, agus staid tosaigh.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Iarr áit nó téama, ansin treoraigh le suíomh, scála, agus príomhghnéithe.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Iarr réamhriachtanais, samhail shimplí, samplaí, agus míthuiscint choitianta.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Iarr sprioc taighde, leibhéal, agus foinsí atá ar fáil.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Iarr ról, lucht féachana, agus cúlra; ansin rith an chéad cheist.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Iarr bunábhar nó ábhar agus deacracht sprice.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Iarr bunábhar, ábhar, agus mionsonra sprice má tá siad ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Iarr aiseolas ar struchtúr, fianaise, agus soiléireacht agus coinnigh an dréacht deiridh mar do cheann féin.
